diagrams.name: cli_entry_point
diagrams.title: CLI Entry Point & Command Routing
diagrams.description: Main CLI module routing detect, live, skills install/update/check commands to sub-modules

diagrams.name: antipattern_detection_engine
diagrams.title: Anti-Pattern Detection Engine (Node.js)
diagrams.description: Core detection logic: rule constants, scan functions, DOM traversal, result reporting, CLI output

diagrams.name: antipattern_detection_browser
diagrams.title: Anti-Pattern Detection (Browser Build)
diagrams.description: Browser-adapted version of the detector: DOM scanning, overlay injection, re-scan API

diagrams.name: server_api_layer
diagrams.title: Server API Layer
diagrams.description: HTTP server routing with handlers for /api/commands, /api/patterns, /api/skills, and download endpoints

diagrams.name: server_validation
diagrams.title: Server Input Validation
diagrams.description: Shared validation helpers for provider names, types, IDs, and filename sanitization

diagrams.name: download_provider_system
diagrams.title: Download Provider System
diagrams.description: Provider registry (cursor, claude-code, gemini, codex, etc.) and edge-function download endpoints
diagrams.scope: lib/ + functions/ — provider config and download API

diagrams.name: build_pipeline
diagrams.title: Build Pipeline Orchestration
diagrams.description: Main build script coordinating skill loading, provider transformation, ZIP generation, count generation, and sub-page building

diagrams.name: skill_transformer_system
diagrams.title: Skill Transformer System
diagrams.description: Factory pattern for provider-specific skill transformers; FIELD_SPECS, frontmatter generation, body transformation per provider

diagrams.name: build_utilities
diagrams.title: Build Utilities & Packaging
diagrams.description: Shared file helpers (parseFrontmatter, readSourceFiles, YAML generation), ZIP packaging (createProviderZip), and Markdown/HTML rendering

diagrams.name: browser_extension_core
diagrams.title: Browser Extension Core (Service Worker & Content Script)
diagrams.description: Service worker managing per-tab state, badge updates, panel/popup messaging, and the content script injecting detection overlays

diagrams.name: browser_extension_ui
diagrams.title: Browser Extension UI (DevTools & Popup)
diagrams.description: DevTools panel, sidebar, and popup modules for displaying findings, toggling overlays, and filtering rules

diagrams.name: frontend_app_and_components
diagrams.title: Frontend App & UI Components
diagrams.description: Main app bootstrapper and reusable UI components: GlassTerminal, SectionNav, FoundationGrid, ArtGallery, Lens
diagrams.scope: public/ — frontend app bootstrap and UI components

diagrams.name: frontend_visual_effects
diagrams.title: Frontend Visual Effects
diagrams.description: Canvas-based animations and visual effects: hero shader grid, liquid canvas physics (Point class), split-compare slider, framework periodic table viz

diagrams.name: frontend_demo_system
diagrams.title: Frontend Demo System
diagrams.description: Demo renderer, demo toggle controls, command demo index, and skill demo modules (color, typography, motion, etc.)

diagrams.name: test_suite
diagrams.title: Test Suite
diagrams.description: Unit and integration tests: anti-pattern detection, skills CLI, build pipeline, transformer factories, server download validation
